articles.title: ⚠️The Athletic reports: Foden, agreement in principle over new deal
articles.description: According to reports from England, the English winger is very close to signing his contract extension until 2030. After the departures of key figures like Stones and Bernardo Silva were confirmed, Manchester City needed some good news—and they have it with Phil Foden. According to The Athletic, the English winger would extend his contract with the Citizens until 2030, with the option of an additional year. If confirmed, Foden would become one of the veterans of a City side where he has been everything and won everything. From the youth ranks to becoming a living legend. This article was translated into English by Artificial Intelligence. You can read the original version in 🇪🇸 here.

articles.title: The 5 Most Interesting Analyst Questions From NOV’s Q1 Earnings Call
articles.description: NOV’s first quarter was marked by operational headwinds stemming from the ongoing conflict in the Middle East, which management cited as the primary driver of underperformance relative to profit expectations. Logistics constraints, higher freight costs, and shipment delays notably impacted both capital equipment and aftermarket operations, particularly in the final month of the quarter.
